titleText: JTF News: France 24, ABC News Australia
mainText: President Trump stated the US acted on its 'last, best chance' to hit Iran.
President Emmanuel Macron of France stated France will increase its nuclear arsenal.
Israel and Hezbollah exchange fire in southern and eastern Lebanon.
The U.S. stated that Kuwait downed 3 American jets during Iranian attacks, with all crew members safely ejecting.
At least 148 people are dead following a reported strike on a school, according to Iranian authorities.
